text: I guess I'm getting somewhere..... pic.twitter.com/aNF5kCF8RZ
I'm still playing around with openclaw, but it seems like when the going gets tough, I just call in claude code and it one-shot fixes everything and points out how my openclaw agents were wrong.

For the first time in two decades, I find myself a free agent with no destination. My nearly 10 years at Oracle, following the acquisition of iron.io, have come to an end. I'm excited to build again and explore what's out there. Reach out if you'd like to chat! 💥
